raw_text: i used blinkit from last 5 to 6 months, almost every 2 to 3 days i have to order from it. and i faced a lot of issues with the product. if i order romaine lettuce in the evening, they never deliver it and they deliver green lettuce instead of romaine lettuce. and this not like 1 or 2 times but always! And if i order bell pepper yellow or red both, i always receive the spoiled! i mean if you don't have it then just don't sell it. the word limit is too little I can't write all my problems! 🤬😡🤬

Yesterday I ordered a air cooler from blinkit, when the delivery person delivered it I requested him to test the product. he said mam if you have any concern with the product you can return it. I tried the product and it's too noisy and not give a proper cooling for small room. so since morning I am trying to reach out to the customer service to get this product return and the customer service is just asking me to wait to go through the issue details it been more than 40 min they have put me on

there was a major issue with the product, and its quality was very poor as well. Even the Blinkit customer care did not resolve my problem, nor did they process the return. I never expected such poor service from Blinkit, but now I will delete this app even from my family members' phones and will never use it again.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent service from Blinkit! My order was delivered incredibly fast, and everything arrived fresh, well-packed, and exactly as ordered. The delivery partner was polite and professional, and the entire experience was smooth from start to finish. Blinkit has made grocery shopping so convenient and hassle-free. I'm truly impressed with the speed, quality, and reliability. Highly recommended to everyone. Keep up the fantastic work!👌🏻👌🏻

cause , one day I ordered something but they said some products are not available but they were available while at the time I was ordering product so I cancelled my order and I already paid amount through upi and amount was already deducted from account so, I claimed for refund but still till today I haven't received refund but app shows that refund is provided, I want my refund..

I’d rate Blinkit 4.5 out of 5 stars. Honestly,it has made life a lot easier. Whenever I suddenly run out of something whether it’s snacks, groceries, or even small essentials Blinkit delivers it super quickly. Most of my orders arrive within minutes, which still feels kind of amazing. The app is simple to use, and I like how everything is organized, so finding items doesn’t take much time. The product quality is usually good, and the packaging is neat. Delivery partners are also polite.

very high delivery charges, very High prices of all products. i can't suggest this app to anyone. i hve ordered some items, they show that payment will be deducted from my Amazon pay balance, when i click on proceed, payment was immediately deducted, no sms, no confirmation,. And when i cancel my order within 1-2 minute, they have deducted 20 rupees as cancellation charges. and said that my account will be refunded in two day itni beimaan company. isko to india me black list kar dena chahiye.

Order deliveries are consistently delayed, and even upon arrival, items are frequently missing due to stock unavailability. It would be far more efficient to mark such items as out of stock on the app beforehand rather than informing customers after the order is placed. Other delivery platforms seem to manage this process much more effectively.

My recent order arrived with the product seal broken and part of the item missing. Your app offers no option to upload photos, start a return, or reach an agent. This issue has happened multiple times. If this is not resolved immediately with a refund or replacement, I will stop using your app

Most of the delivery partners don't know the correct address. Like I ordered from two numbers so both numbers have the same address but from one number whenever I order something the delivery partner reaches the location correctly but from the other number, the delivery partner always says it's the wrong address. And I lost my COD bcz one delivery partner didn't know the correct address and then told me to cancel it. I was unaware of the cancellation policy that time...

i had ordered something and returned the order. They took the order but refund is still not processed. It's been more than 1 month.... other apps are far better in this... return and refund.... they instantly refund the amount as the pickup the order.... only 1 star....

Blinkit is a very good app to buy groceries. However, of late I have seen a deterioration of the quality of fruits and vegetables from their Bandra West outlet. No doubt a refund is paid instantly but that is not we are looking for as it spoils the day as we are not able to use the product.

best app ever as it makes our work easy but the minus point is that it have limited options only. I want to order a football but did'nt like and when I scrolled down I thought I might get some other options but did'nt get any other. But still, one of the best app ever(for me).

Worst experience while it took 2 days to place an order to confirm, I added money in blinkit wallet every time it saying this payment method is not available at the time, then why did they asked add money to wallet, instead tryed paying with other options again all are in red displaying this payment method is not available, with all this they took 2 days to or taken 2 days to place a successful order. This is my first order in blinkit, nice user experience

blinkit is good but the prices of the items are more than they are in market. and then u charge an extra of handling charges and delivery charges. if u ppl are charging us for delivery and handling then why there is a rates hike in the prices of items.

Blinkit is the worst app: 1. While ordering, it selects Amazon pay balance by default when I wanted to pay with my credit card. U should show the final summary of the order before placing it finally.Many people order by mistake while just checking the order and its delivery charges. This is blinkit's agenda that they dont give u time to review the order. It just places the order by selecting the payment method which doesn't require pin/otp by default so that u shouldnt have any option to go back

It is a fast delivery aap no doubt but if you have any problem with your delivered product, just forgot about refund,they no more refund even if you submit all related videos and photos, which is so annoying and there delevery partner are also become careless and rude I don't if this happen in my city only,i decided to to no more blinkit from now

I have been waiting for my order for more than 20 minutes now, but no rider has been assigned yet. The order status is still showing as not picked up. This is very disappointing and defeats the purpose of quick delivery from Blinkit. Extremely poor service. Please improve this.

On June 24, 2026. I placed the order in the blinkit app worth 650 INR. The first delivery driver delivered the 2 products out of the 3 items. Another one took nearly 25 minutes to deliver and no notification or any message displayed on the app that it will be delivered by another delivery man. what if I had mistakenly re-ordered that item? would it not be a hassle. I think the delivery drivers need to be provided a message to deliver timely or else do not provide the false reach time of 9 min.

My experience with Blinkit has been very disappointing. In one order, my Munch chocolate was missing, and although customer support promised a refund, I never received it. Later, I got the wrong cup noodles and was told a delivery boy come , return them for a refund, but again no money was refunded. In my next order, a Kurkure packet was also missing. Their customer service is very poor and unreliable, and these repeated issues have been frustrating..
